title: Bochum, North Rhine-Westphalia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bochum, North Rhine-Westphalia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bochum is a city in North Rhine-Westphalia with a population of 365,000. A university city in the Ruhr with a lively student scene, the German Mining Museum, and a thriving cultural and music heritage.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
